properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: HMAC signing secret for JWT (UTF-8, minimum 32 bytes). In production set JWT_SECRET; dev profile supplies a local default.

properties.name: finpay.monitoring.initial-delay-ms
properties.description: Delay before the first autonomous fraud monitoring run (ms).

properties.name: finpay.monitoring.fixed-delay-ms
properties.description: Delay after each monitoring run completes before the next run (ms); avoids overlapping runs.
